description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylishly eclectic overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with tonal belts.UpperTwo-tone synthetic upper with leather overlays across the toe box, on the midfoot and on the collarCentral lace ups with elasticated loops on one side and metal eyelets on the otherPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with a curved midfoot for ergonomic comfortGeometric grooves on the forefoot and terraced lugs on the heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard, with brandingShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
